common.tagline: Management, methodology and sports development for grassroots and amateur football coaches.

signin.title: Sign in to MisterFC
signin.subtitle: Enter your email and password.
signin.signup_link: Don't have an account? Create one
signin.error_email_not_confirmed: You haven't verified your email yet. Check your inbox.
signin.error_generic: We couldn't sign you in. Please try again.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: We'll send a verification email.
signup.error_full_name_too_short: Name must be at least 2 characters
signup.error_password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters
signup.error_user_already_exists: An account with this email already exists. Sign in instead.
signup.error_generic: We couldn't create the account. Please try again.

forgot_password.title: Reset your password
forgot_password.subtitle: We'll send you a link to set a new one.
forgot_password.error_generic: We couldn't send the link. Please try again.

reset_password.title: New password
reset_password.subtitle: Enter your new password.
reset_password.no_session_body: This reset link has been used or has expired. Request a new one.
reset_password.error_password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters
reset_password.error_no_session: No active session. Request a new reset link.
reset_password.error_generic: We couldn't update the password. Please try again.

signup.title: Verify your email
signup.body: We sent a verification email to {email}. Open it from this device to activate your account.
signup.body_fallback: We sent you a verification email. Open it from this device to activate your account.

reset.title: Check your email
reset.body: If an account exists for {email}, we've sent a link to reset your password.
reset.body_fallback: If an account exists for that email, we've sent a link to reset your password.

callback.error_body: The link is expired or already used. Request a new one from sign in.

onboarding.title: Create your club
onboarding.subtitle: You're the first member. Create your club and you'll be the admin.
onboarding.error_slug_collision: A club with a very similar name already exists. Tweak it a bit.
onboarding.error_already_in_a_club: You already belong to a club. Go back to home.
onboarding.error_generic: We couldn't create the club. Please try again.

home.no_clubs: You don't belong to any club yet.

upcoming.empty: No events in the next 7 days.

coach_callups.cta: {count, plural, =1 {1 match without call-up →} other {# matches without call-up →}}

invitations.title: Invitations
invitations.subtitle: Invite people to {club} with the appropriate role.
invitations.empty: You haven't sent any invitations yet.

form.error_forbidden: You don't have permission to invite in this club
form.error_no_club: You don't belong to any club yet
form.error_generic: We couldn't create the invitation. Please try again.

confirm.title: Cancel invitation
confirm.description: Cancel the invitation to {email}? They won't be able to use the link they received. This action cannot be undone.

errors.already_accepted: This invitation was already accepted; it can't be cancelled.
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to cancel this invitation.

invite.title: Accept invitation
invite.summary: You've been invited to join {club} as {role}.
invite.set_password_summary: You've been invited to join {club} as {role}. Fill in your details and set a password for your account.
invite.error_wrong_email: This invitation is for a different email. Sign out and sign in with the invited email.
invite.error_expired: This invitation has expired. Ask the club admin for a new one.
invite.error_already_accepted: This invitation has already been accepted.
invite.error_full_name_too_short: Name must be at least 2 characters
invite.error_password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters
invite.error_no_session: Session not found. Please reopen the link from your email.
invite.error_generic: We couldn't process the invitation. Please try again.

errors.dorsal_invalid: El dorsal debe estar entre 1 y 99.

family.empty: Aún no hay cuentas de familia vinculadas.

field.help: Determina el vínculo legal. Ambos comparten la misma vista del jugador.

errors.forbidden: No tienes permiso para invitar tutores en este club.
errors.generic: No se pudo enviar la invitación.

assign.description: Al asignar a un equipo nuevo, el equipo actual se cierra con la fecha de hoy. La trayectoria se conserva.

errors.dorsal_invalid: El dorsal debe estar entre 1 y 99.
errors.forbidden: No tienes permiso para gestionar este jugador.

jugadores.subtitle: Club-wide list with filters and individual assignment.
jugadores.forbidden_no_cap: You don't have permission to view the global list. Ask a head coach or coordinator to grant you the 'Manage squad' capability.

equipo_detalle.roster_empty: Aún no hay jugadores asignados a este equipo.

invite.title: Invitar cuerpo técnico
invite.description: Envía una invitación por email. Al aceptar quedará vinculado a este equipo con la función indicada.

field.help: Solo un entrenador principal por equipo. Preparador físico y delegado se gestionan como ayudantes a nivel de club (sin caps por defecto).

errors.principal_exists: Ya hay un entrenador principal activo en este equipo. Quita el actual antes de invitar otro.
errors.forbidden: No tienes permiso para invitar staff en este equipo.
errors.generic: No se pudo enviar la invitación.

remove.title: Quitar del cuerpo técnico
remove.description: ¿Seguro que quieres quitar a {name} del cuerpo técnico de este equipo? Su membership en el club no se ve afectada.

capabilities.subtitle: Permisos del entrenador ayudante
capabilities.read_only: Solo el entrenador principal del equipo, coordinador o admin puede modificar estos permisos.
capabilities.not_assistant: Este miembro no es entrenador ayudante. Los permisos solo aplican a ayudantes.

can_evaluate.label: Valorar a jugadores
can_evaluate.description: Puede dejar valoraciones individuales post-partido y post-entrenamiento.

can_create_lineups.label: Crear alineaciones
can_create_lineups.description: Puede preparar alineaciones (titular, plan B, segunda parte).

can_register_match_events.label: Registrar eventos del partido
can_register_match_events.description: Puede usar la pantalla de toma de datos en directo.

can_create_sessions.label: Crear sesiones de entrenamiento

can_create_plays.label: Crear jugadas tácticas
can_create_plays.description: Puede crear y compartir jugadas con el equipo.

can_see_medical.label: Ver notas médicas
can_see_medical.description: Puede leer las notas médicas de los jugadores del equipo.

can_message_families.label: Escribir a familias
can_message_families.description: Puede iniciar conversaciones con tutores legales.

can_manage_squad.label: Gestionar plantilla
can_manage_squad.description: Puede crear/editar fichas y subir fotos. Sin esto, no puede dar de alta jugadores.

errors.forbidden: No tienes permiso para modificar este permiso.
errors.not_assistant: Este miembro no es entrenador ayudante.
errors.db: No se pudo guardar. Inténtalo de nuevo.

can_manage_calendar.label: Manage calendar
can_manage_calendar.description: Can create, edit and delete team events. Without this, can only view the calendar.

import.title: Importar jugadores
import.subtitle: Sube un CSV o Excel con tu plantilla. Hasta 500 filas por carga.

upload.title: Sube tu archivo
upload.help: Usa la plantilla descargable. Solo Nombre y Fecha de nacimiento son obligatorios. Fecha en formato día/mes/año (15/03/2010). Posiciones y pie aceptan castellano (Portero, Defensa, Mediocentro, Delantero, Derecho, Izquierdo...).

preview.truncated: +{count} filas más se procesan igual aunque no se muestren aquí.

reason.date_of_birth_invalid: Formato de fecha no reconocido. Usa dd/mm/yyyy (ej. 15/03/2010)
reason.position_invalid: Posición no reconocida. Opciones: Portero, Defensa, Lateral, Mediocentro, Delantero, Extremo (y sinónimos)
reason.foot_invalid: Pie no reconocido. Opciones: Derecho, Izquierdo, Ambidiestro
reason.team_assign_failed: creado pero no asignado al equipo

error.parse_failed: No hemos podido leer el archivo. Comprueba el formato.
error.no_recognized_headers: No reconocemos ninguna columna. Asegúrate de usar la plantilla.

notificaciones.title: Notifications
notificaciones.subtitle: Choose which devices get push and what the app alerts you about.

push.title: Push on this browser
push.description: Enable Web Push so the app can alert you when it's closed. Works on Chrome, Firefox, Edge, and iOS 16.4+ with MisterFC installed as an app.
push.unsupported_title: Your browser doesn't support Web Push
push.unsupported_body: On iPhone/iPad this only works if you install MisterFC to the home screen (Share → Add to Home Screen) on iOS 16.4 or later.
push.denied_body: You've blocked notifications for this site. Re-enable them in your browser settings.
push.status_granted_no_sub: Permission granted. Press the button to subscribe.
push.status_inactive: You're not subscribed on this device.
push.error_permission: Browser permission is required to send you notifications.

preferences.title: What you want to receive
preferences.description: The in-app bell always receives alerts. Push only works if you've subscribed this device above. Email will be enabled when available.

new_message.label: New message
new_message.description: A coach or family member sends you a direct message.

callup_published.label: Callup published
callup_published.description: Your coach publishes a match callup.

match_callup_reminder.label: Match reminder
match_callup_reminder.description: Day-before alert if you haven't confirmed your callup yet.

training_reminder.label: Training reminder
training_reminder.description: Day-before alert for a training session.

attendance_pending_reminder.label: Attendance pending
attendance_pending_reminder.description: For coaches: alert if attendance is still unmarked.

alineacion.empty_hint: No lineup yet for this match. Create one to start.

errors.forbidden: You can’t edit this lineup.

errors.player_not_in_team_at_event: Player not in the team on that date.
errors.coords_only_field: Coordinates only valid on the field.

alineacion.tactical_notes_staff_only: Only visible to the coaching staff.

alineacion.field_full: Maximum {max} players on the pitch for this format.
alineacion.discarded_empty: No discards. Drag here to discard.

alineacion.discard_reason_body: The player will be removed from the call-up and from every lineup of this match.

formaciones.select_chip_hint: Tap a position on the pitch to edit its code.
